name: Men's Trip 2026
subtitle: The San Francisco Playbook

phases.summary: Current mission: figure out where eight fraternity brothers are sleeping

phases.summary: Rob has already put points on the board

phases.label: Restaurants & Bars

phases.label: Men's Dinner

accommodations.name: The Barnes San Francisco
accommodations.sleeping: Two junior suites with king bed + sofa bed, plus one room with two queen beds
accommodations.gathering: Moderate — junior suites provide sitting space
cons: Some men will use sofa beds or share beds
Less common space than a house

accommodations.name: Golden Gate Park 4BR Home
accommodations.sleeping: Four bedrooms; some men would need bunk beds

accommodations.name: The Surf Shack
accommodations.sleeping: Six or more beds; exact assignment to confirm

recommendation.title: Current clubhouse leader: The Barnes
recommendation.reason: Gus already has it locked down, it is the cheapest confirmed option, and we can bail by October 15 if a better house appears. Solid veteran move by Gus.

questions: Confirm the dates for Rob's two booked tours
Are we keeping The Barnes, or does a house win the day?
Get the direct Airbnb links into the app
Sort out who gets beds, sofa beds, and the occasional character-building bunk
Estimate Uber and transit costs by neighborhood
Decide how much shared gathering space matters
Has Roland found the legendary Men's Dinner yet?

notes.author: Bill
notes.text: Adjusted the app tone to sound more like the group: practical, brotherly, and lightly amused.

notes.author: Bill
notes.text: Clarified that Jason will wait at SFO for the group rather than going to the hotel early; he may have a drink while waiting.

notes.author: Bill
notes.text: Added incoming flight arrival times to coordinate the Wednesday meetup at SFO and the hotel.

notes.author: Rob Baker
notes.text: Booked the Alcatraz / Muir Woods / Sausalito tour and a hop-on, hop-off San Francisco bus tour. Dates are still unknown.

notes.author: Gus
notes.text: Reserved three rooms at The Barnes for $4,246 total. Cancelable through October 15.

notes.author: James
notes.text: Suggested Golden Gate Park 4BR Home and The Surf Shack as Airbnb alternatives.

responsibilities.detail: Golden Gate Park home and Surf Shack

arrivals.meetup: Will hold down the fort at SFO and wait for the crew — quite possibly with a cold beverage in hand.
Lands shortly before Bill and the Texas crew. Excellent timing, Roland.
The main wave. Natural group for the ride into the city.
Bringing up the rear and meeting the brotherhood at the hotel.

arrivalSummary.title: Airport game plan
arrivalSummary.text: Jason lands first and will hold down the fort at SFO, possibly with a cold beverage. Roland and Bill/Texas arrive only 22 minutes apart, setting up the main airport reunion. Avi rolls in later and will meet the brotherhood at the hotel.
